points.text: Sanofi and Regeneron received US FDA approval for Dupixent (dupilumab), an IL-4Rα antagonist monoclonal antibody, as the first biologic medicine for young children with uncontrolled chronic spontaneous urticaria.
NETRIS Pharma published positive Phase 1b LAPNET-01 data in Nature for NP137, an anti-netrin-1 monoclonal antibody, showing 10.85 months median PFS in locally advanced pancreatic cancer patients.

CytoDyn completed enrollment in its Phase 2 CLOVER study evaluating leronlimab, a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5, in combination with TAS-102 and bevacizumab for metastatic colorectal cancer.

TG Therapeutics completed enrollment in a Phase 3 trial for subcutaneous BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy), an anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody, for relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS), with topline data expected late 2026 or early 2027.
Jade Biosciences is advancing JADE101, a selective anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody for IgA nephropathy, with Phase 1 interim data expected Q2 2026 and a Phase 2 trial in patients planned for mid-2026.
Jade Biosciences expects to initiate a first-in-human Phase 1 trial for JADE201, a half-life extended afucosylated anti-BAFF receptor monoclonal antibody, in rheumatoid arthritis patients in Q2 2026.
Sanofi's Tzield (teplizumab-mzwv), a CD3-directed monoclonal antibody, received FDA approval for an expanded indication to delay stage 3 type 1 diabetes in children aged 1 to 7 years.

Quayside Research's EVT894, a monoclonal antibody, demonstrated potential as both treatment and prophylaxis for chikungunya virus in a first-in-human randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study.
Sanofi reported Q1 2026 Dupixent sales of €4.2 billion, representing a 30.8% year-over-year increase driven by immunology approvals.
Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center identified two monoclonal antibodies targeting gp350 and eight targeting gp42 to block Epstein-Barr virus (EBV) entry into human immune cells.
One monoclonal antibody developed by Fred Hutch researchers completely prevented EBV infection in mice engineered with human immune systems.
Sartorius launched the CellCelector CLD, an automated imaging platform designed to accelerate monoclonal cell line development (CLD) by reducing timelines from months to approximately seven weeks.
Sartorius CellCelector CLD paired with Next Generation CLD Nanowell Plates delivers 40% more monoclonal wells and over threefold higher clone outgrowth than standard plates.
Sartorius CellCelector CLD yields up to 15,000 monoclonality-verified clones ready for isolation in four days with 100% transfer efficiency.
Merck received European Commission approval for Enflonsia, a monoclonal antibody indicated for the prevention of RSV lower respiratory tract disease in infants during their first RSV season.

Sanofi / Regeneron — Dupixent (dupilumab) — Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria (CSU) in young children — FDA approved as first biologic medicine for this indication; mechanism: IL-4Rα antagonist monoclonal antibody.

NETRIS Pharma — NP137 — Locally advanced pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma — Phase 1b LAPNET-01 data published in Nature: 10.85 months median PFS, 16.43 months median OS, 23% conversion-to-surgery rate with mFOLFIRINOX.
CytoDyn — Leronlimab — Metastatic colorectal cancer — Phase 2 CLOVER study enrollment completed (n>60); evaluating combination with TAS-102 and bevacizumab in CCR5-positive MSS patients.

TG Therapeutics — BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy) — Relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis — Phase 3 subcutaneous enrollment completed; non-inferiority study comparing every 8-week and 12-week SC dosing vs IV dosing; topline data expected year-end 2026/Q1 2027.
Jade Biosciences — JADE101 — IgA nephropathy — Selective anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody; Phase 1 healthy volunteer interim data expected Q2 2026; Phase 2 patient trial initiation planned mid-2026.

Jade Biosciences — JADE201 — Rheumatoid arthritis — Half-life extended afucosylated anti-BAFF receptor monoclonal antibody; First-in-human Phase 1 trial initiation expected Q2 2026; interim data anticipated 2027.

Sanofi — Tzield (teplizumab-mzwv) — Type 1 Diabetes (Stage 3 prevention in children aged 1–7) — FDA approved expanded indication based on PETITE-T1D Phase 4 interim data showing 89.6% probability of not progressing to stage 3 disease over 51.9 weeks median follow-up.
Quayside Research — EVT894 — Chikungunya virus infection — Monoclonal antibody (mAb) evaluated in first-in-human study at three US research sites; presented at ESCMID Global Congress.
Sanofi / Regeneron — Dupixent (dupilumab) — Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria in children — FDA approval granted as first biologic for this indication; Q1 2026 sales reached €4.2B (+30.8% YoY).

Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center — Anti-EBV monoclonal antibodies — Epstein-Barr Virus (EBV) — Identified 10 novel monoclonal antibodies (2 anti-gp350, 8 anti-gp42) that block viral attachment and fusion; one candidate achieved 100% infection prevention in humanized mouse models.
Sartorius — CellCelector CLD — Monoclonal Cell Line Development — Launched automated imaging platform reducing screening time to ~7 weeks; yields 15,000 monoclonality-verified clones in 4 days.
Merck — Enflonsia — RSV prevention in infants — European Commission granted marketing authorization for the monoclonal antibody to prevent lower respiratory tract disease during the first RSV season.

Sanofi / Regeneron — Expansion of Dupixent (dupilumab) monoclonal antibody label — Pediatric CSU indication — FDA approval granted April 2026; targets uncontrolled chronic spontaneous urticaria in young children.
NETRIS Pharma — First-in-class anti-netrin-1 monoclonal antibody development — NP137 — Phase 1b data supports regulatory engagement in US/EU; neogenin identified as predictive biomarker.
CytoDyn — CCR5-targeting humanized monoclonal antibody commercialization — Leronlimab — Phase 2 CLOVER enrollment complete; data expected to inform development strategy for mCRC.

TG Therapeutics — Subcutaneous formulation expansion for approved monoclonal antibody franchise — BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy) — Phase 3 SC trial enrollment complete; aims to offer self-administered at-home option for RMS patients.

Jade Biosciences — Best-in-class autoimmune monoclonal antibody pipeline development — JADE101 (anti-APRIL) + JADE201 (anti-BAFF-R) — $336M cash runway into H1 2028; multiple clinical milestones scheduled for 2026.

Sanofi — Pediatric expansion of CD3-directed monoclonal antibody therapy — Tzield (teplizumab-mzwv) — Secured FDA approval for ages 1–7 following PETITE-T1D trial; previously approved in 2022 for ages 8+.
Quayside Research — Development of first-in-class monoclonal antibody for neglected tropical diseases — EVT894 — First-in-human study completed; data presented at ESCMID Global 2026.
Sanofi — Immunology portfolio expansion via monoclonal antibody Dupixent — Dupilumab — Q1 2026 revenue €4.2B; secured US approval for pediatric chronic spontaneous urticaria indication.
Regeneron — Co-development of IL-4Rα monoclonal antibody — Dupixent (dupilumab) — Partnered with Sanofi; shared in Q1 2026 sales growth of 30.8% to €4.2B.
Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center — EBV therapeutic discovery — Anti-gp350 and anti-gp42 monoclonal antibodies — Preclinical validation completed; findings published in Cell Reports Medicine.
Sartorius — Accelerated monoclonal cell line development workflows — CellCelector CLD platform — Delivers 40% more monoclonal wells and 3x higher clone outgrowth vs standard Nanowell Plates.
Merck — Monoclonal antibody commercialization in pediatrics — Enflonsia — Secured European Commission approval for RSV prevention in infants.

Dupixent (dupilumab) — Mechanism: IL-4Rα antagonist monoclonal antibody blocking IL-4 and IL-13 signaling — Phase: Approved (post-marketing expansion) — Population: Young children with uncontrolled chronic spontaneous urticaria — Comparator: None (first-in-class biologic approval for this age group) — Outcome: First biologic medicine approved for pediatric CSU.

NP137 — Mechanism: Anti-netrin-1 monoclonal antibody blocking netrin-1/EMT axis — Phase: 1b — Population: Locally advanced pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma — Comparator: mFOLFIRINOX alone (implied) — Results: 10.85 months median PFS; 40% conversion-to-surgery in neogenin-high subset.

Leronlimab — Mechanism: Humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5 receptor — Phase: 2 — Population: CCR5-positive, microsatellite stable metastatic colorectal cancer — Comparator: TAS-102 + bevacizumab (control arm) — Endpoint: Clinical activity and biomarker modulation; enrollment complete.

BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy) — Mechanism: Glycoengineered anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody targeting unique epitope for efficient B-cell depletion at low doses — Phase: 3 (SC formulation) — Population: Adults with RMS — Comparator: IV BRIUMVI — Endpoint: Non-inferior exposure (AUC) at week 24.

JADE101 — Mechanism: Selective anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody — Phase: 1 (healthy volunteers) / Phase 2 (planned) — Population: IgA nephropathy patients — Endpoint: Biomarker-rich interim results to define dose/dose interval; Phase 2 initiation mid-2026.

JADE201 — Mechanism: Half-life extended afucosylated anti-BAFF receptor monoclonal antibody — Phase: 1 (first-in-human) — Population: Rheumatoid arthritis patients — Endpoint: Safety and tolerability; interim data anticipated 2027.

Teplizumab-mzwv — Mechanism: CD3-directed monoclonal antibody — Phase: 4 (PETITE-T1D) — Population: Children aged 1–7 with stage 2 type 1 diabetes — Comparator: None (single-arm) — Results: 89.6% probability of not progressing to stage 3 diabetes; 2/15 participants progressed; no grade 4 or 5 adverse events reported.

EVT894 — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody (mAb) — Phase: First-in-human — Population: Chikungunya virus infection — Comparator: Placebo — Results: Showed potential as both treatment and prophylaxis; specific efficacy endpoints not detailed in source.

Anti-EBV monoclonal antibodies — Mechanism: Blockade of gp350 (attachment) and gp42 (fusion) viral proteins — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Humanized mice with human immune systems — Results: Complete prevention of EBV infection in vivo.

CellCelector CLD — Mechanism: High-speed automated scanning and gentle clone retrieval — Phase: Preclinical/Process Development — Population: Monoclonal cell line candidates — Endpoints/Results: 15,000 monoclonality-verified clones in 4 days; 100% transfer efficiency.

Enflonsia — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting RSV — Phase: Post-approval (Regulatory) — Population: Infants in first RSV season — Comparator: N/A — Endpoints/Results: Approved by European Commission for prevention of lower respiratory tract disease.
NETRIS Pharma — Regulatory strategy — NP137 — Planning engagement with US and EU regulators to define development pathway following positive Phase 1b monoclonal antibody data.

Jade Biosciences — Corporate financial update — Pipeline advancement — Reported $336 million cash, cash equivalents, and investments as of December 31, 2025, providing runway into H1 2028 to support monoclonal antibody clinical programs.
Sanofi — Commercial performance of monoclonal antibody portfolio — Dupixent — Q1 2026 sales €4.2B (+30.8% YoY); contributed to total Pharma launch sales of €1.2B (+49.6%).

Sanofi — Q1 2026 financial performance — Dupixent (dupilumab) — Net sales €4.2B (+30.8%); total net sales €10.5B (+13.6% at CER); business EPS €1.88 (+14.0% at CER); completed €921M of €1B share buyback.
Sartorius — Commercialization of automated CLD ecosystem — CellCelector CLD — Integrated with Next Generation CLD Nanowell Plates to support EMA 410-compliant productivity assays.
Sartorius — Product launch — CellCelector CLD — New automated platform released to reduce monoclonal cell line development costs and timelines for bioprocess teams.
